message:
Command `# Process only has 4 FDs: stdin=devnull, stdout=pipe, stderr=pipe, the tcl script.
# It hasn't opened the ODB file yet! The process is still loading TCL/Python.
# BUT wait - rchar=220MB was read earlier. Let me check memory maps.
# 
# Actually OpenROAD reads the ODB directly. Let me check if it has any mapped files.
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null
echo "Total FD count:"
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "---"
# Check memory maps for the ODB file
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep "odb\|\.lib\|sky130\|CF_SRAM" | head -5` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Process only has 4 FDs: stdin=devnull, stdout=pipe, stderr=pipe, the tcl script.
# It hasn't opened the ODB file yet! The process is still loading TCL/Python.
# BUT wait - rchar=220MB was read earlier. Let me check memory maps.
# 
# Actually OpenROAD reads the ODB directly. Let me check if it has any mapped files.
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null
echo "Total FD count:"
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "---"
# Check memory maps for the ODB file
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep "odb\|\.lib\|sky130\|CF_SRAM" | head -5"}
function.name: execute_bash

extras.command:
# Process only has 4 FDs: stdin=devnull, stdout=pipe, stderr=pipe, the tcl script.
# It hasn't opened the ODB file yet! The process is still loading TCL/Python.
# BUT wait - rchar=220MB was read earlier. Let me check memory maps.
# 
# Actually OpenROAD reads the ODB directly. Let me check if it has any mapped files.
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null
echo "Total FD count:"
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l
echo "---"
# Check memory maps for the ODB file
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep "odb\|\.lib\|sky130\|CF_SRAM" | head -5
